scripts.build:local-studio: bun run --filter '@hyperframes/{parsers,lint,studio-server}' build && bun run --filter @hyperframes/core build && bun run --filter '@hyperframes/{core,engine,producer,player,studio,shader-transitions,sdk}' build && bun run --filter @hyperframes/cli build
scripts.lint: oxlint packages/cli packages/core packages/engine packages/lint packages/parsers packages/player packages/producer packages/sdk packages/shader-transitions packages/studio packages/studio-server
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check packages/cli packages/core packages/engine packages/lint packages/parsers packages/player packages/producer packages/sdk packages/shader-transitions packages/studio packages/studio-server
